text: Ran an end-to-end systematic literature review in the openreview workspace on the clinical question of whether oral melatonin reduces jet lag versus placebo or no treatment in travellers crossing time zones (slug: melatonin-jet-lag). Work centered on the generated review dashboard, which broke with a runtime "Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'arms')" TypeError at melatonin-jet-lag:513 that had to be debugged before the page would render. After the fix the dashboard rendered and ran correctly ("works very well"). The session ended with the user deciding this melatonin-jet-lag review was a throwaway to be deleted before starting a fresh run.
